name: Notion Public Governance Example
description: Public-safe example for recording Notion governance boundaries. This is not a connector, API client, credential store, permission grant, workspace scan, background sync job, or automatic execution path.

access.credential_policy: Do not store Notion tokens, integration secrets, passwords, API keys, cookies, session values, private workspace URLs, or private secrets in this profile.

required_permissions: unknown until user confirmation and host Runtime evidence confirm the task scope
forbidden_operations: Do not store Notion tokens or integration secrets.
Do not claim workspace, page, database, or write access unless confirmed by the user and current host Runtime evidence.
Do not publish, modify, delete, export, sync, or share Notion pages or databases from this profile.
Do not infer private content, team membership, billing plan, admin role, or integration permissions from this example.
Do not treat this profile as a Notion connector, API client, scanner, validator, background sync job, or automatic execution path.

external_writes.notes: Any page edit, database update, publish action, export, share, or integration change requires explicit user approval and current host Runtime evidence outside this profile.

verified: This file is a public-safe example with placeholder Notion workspace and database names.
not_run: No Notion API call was made.
No Notion connector, token, integration secret, workspace, page, database, export, share, or admin setting was accessed.
No permission, billing, role, write-access, or API availability check was executed.
missing: Real Notion workspace access, database access, page write capability, export permission, admin role, and API availability require user confirmation and host Runtime evidence.
